title: deeleo sound pack
description: replaces all villager, zombie villager, and wandering trader noises with voicelines done by deeleo!!
body:
# deeleo sound pack - for versions 1.20 and up
**Replaces all sounds from wandering traders, villagers, and zombie villagers with voicelines done by deeleo.** 
> The pack works on most other minecraft versions, but versions 1.20 and up are the only versions that are officially supported, so the resource pack in older versions of the game may not work as intended or at all.

**If there are any changes that you want me to make, contact my via my discord server!** I will most likely see your message.
> Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/ddQKw5X7WG

Promotional video in the works! For now you're gonna have to play with the resource pack to hear the sounds.
